reasoning: The previous Avatar movies (Avatar 1 and Avatar: The Way of Water) were both nominated for Best Picture, but neither won. Historically, the Academy rarely awards Best Picture to heavy VFX sci-fi blockbusters. Avatar 3 (Fire and Ash) is highly unlikely to break this trend, especially since it is the middle film of a much longer planned franchise, so it wouldn't even get the "series culmination" award bump. Given the massive field of potential contenders for the 98th Academy Awards and the historical bias against this exact type of film, the probability of Avatar 3 winning Best Picture is extremely low. I forecast 2%.
